hooks.command: FILE=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath // empty' 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$FILE" ]; then cd /Users/gyuyoung/Documents/claude-test/figma-design-implementation && git add "$FILE" && git diff --cached --quiet || git commit -m "auto: update ${FILE##*/}" && git push origin main; case "$FILE" in */sams/*) TREE=$(git rev-parse HEAD:sams 2>/dev/null); PARENT=$(git rev-parse sams-github/main 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$TREE" ] && [ -n "$PARENT" ]; then NEW=$(git commit-tree "$TREE" -p "$PARENT" -m "auto: sync sams/" 2>/dev/null); [ -n "$NEW" ] && nohup sh -c "cd /Users/gyuyoung/Documents/claude-test/figma-design-implementation && git push -q sams-github $NEW:main && git update-ref refs/remotes/sams-github/main $NEW" >/tmp/sams-sync.log 2>&1 & fi ;; esac; fi
